title: Q&A Session - Tuesday August 2nd
excerpt:

Topics: 

API
Apps framework (building of custom apps)

If you have questions or issues we can help you with (regarding these topics), or …

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there, you can join us in our Q&A session on August 2nd 14:00 GMT

Topics:

  • API
  • Apps framework (building of custom apps)

If you have questions or issues we can help you with (regarding these topics), or if you just want to listen other devs and what they are doing with monday, this is the right place for you!

If you have any questions about the use of the platform (regular use not related to building an app / API) then you can contact us here .

You can book your spot here !

See you there

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml: @Matias.Monday Has this moved to August 9th? I can’t see the calendly link for today

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @dvdsmpsn ,

Matias here!

Nope. The meeting had place yesterday but you can book a spot until a few hours before the meeting.

We will be posting a new link for the Q&As soon.

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: jailynnlucidday (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Matias.Monday Love the Q&A!

Does monday have a course that they suggest for people who are just starting to work with APIs?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @jailynnlucidday!

We do not have a specific course for APIs to recommend but we always suggest taking a look at our API documentation to get familiar with our GraphQL API

Cheers,
Matias
